## Title: Fix stack buffer overflow in SSB bitmap parsing

### Summary
The `get_ssb_bitmap()` function in the NR MAC gNB radio configuration module contains a stack buffer overflow when processing the long SSB bitmap format (case 3). The code unconditionally iterates over 8 bytes of the `longBitmap.buf` array without validating the actual buffer size, causing out-of-bounds reads when the buffer contains fewer than 8 bytes. This can lead to memory corruption, undefined behavior, or crashes when p
